# Weiwei Zipper

> Weiwei Zipper focuses on metal zippers, resin zippers, and nylon zippers for garment, bag, footwear, and sun-protective apparel projects. The site keeps the original layout while the content has been replaced with the current Chinese business copy.

## Core Pages

- Home: Brand overview, category highlights, use-cases, and direct inquiry CTA
- Products: Resin / nylon / metal zipper categories and 3 / 5 / 8 size details
- Use Cases: Garments, bags, and footwear applications
- Solutions: Includes a sun-protective jacket zipper solution
- Contact: Phone, WhatsApp, WeChat QR placeholder, business hours, and address notes
- FAQ: Common sizing, sampling, and inquiry questions
